video_id: LEAKED! Hilarious Shadow Puppets - AGT 2023 Early Release.mp4.mp3
transcript: Welcome to America's Got Talent. What's your name? My name is Shadow Ace. And where are you from? I am from Philippines. What do you do? So I'm going to revive a lost art, shadow art. Oh, like shadow puppets. Yeah. I can do a dog. Okay, so I'm going to revive a lost art shadow art oh like shadow puppets yeah yeah I can do a dog okay so how does a young man get into shadow so as a kid growing up we don't have electric power in our house it's like an entertainment for me using candle lights in a wall so that's oh wow do you think this could be at Vegas show an arena show yes okay and who do you look up to in in the world of show business who's your favorite artist so my favorite artist is actually beyonce yes because i know that beyonce is watching america's good talent hi queen and since i know that last year's winner the mayas yeah uh they got them into her concert in dubai yeah this is one of my biggest dream to meet beyonce well the stage is yours Thank you Thank you She's shaving her legs I promise that you won't go again I promise that you won't go again I promise that you won't go again I promise that you to let me in I just wanted to let you in Don't you ever say I just walked away I will always want you I came in like a wrecking ball I never hit so hard in love All I wanted was to break you up All you ever did was wreck me Thanks for watching! All I wanted was to wake you up All you ever did was wake me Yeah, you, you wake me We'll be right back. 아름다워 사랑스러워 그래 너 사랑스러워 사랑스러워 떠날 때까지 가볼까 오빤 강남스타 강남스타 오빤 강남스타 2부에서 계속 됩니다. Gangnam Style Gangnam Style Gangnam Style That was so good!
